title: odostemon lanceolatus
intro: Odostemon lanceolatus, also known as Rocky Mountain peppergrass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Odostemon lanceolatus include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and promoting cough suppression. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
